task_description: Describe the Discovery architecture from Goorha & Ungar (2010) using a Step 1-4 format covering Entity Extraction, Proximity Filtering, Exploding Trend Detection, and Power-Law Scoring.
adaptation_notes: All markdown descriptions were written from scratch guided by LLM prompts. No code cells in this notebook; content is purely descriptive markdown.
top_5_prompts: Write a markdown description of the Discovery architecture from Goorha & Ungar (2010) in a Step 1, Step 2 format covering all four stages of the pipeline.
Explain Entity Extraction in the context of the Discovery system: what n-grams are used and why stop-words are discarded.
Describe the Proximity Filtering step with the <100 characters threshold and explain why character distance is used as a proxy for semantic relatedness.
Explain the Exploding Trend Detection step: what does a 50% increase over a 3-week baseline mean and why is this threshold chosen?
Describe the Power-Law Scoring step with exponent 0.95 and explain the intuition of sub-linear normalisation for signal-to-noise improvement.
